Healthy Families Fresno County
Our Location:
1221 Fulton Street, Fresno CA 93721
Mailing:
PO Box 11867, Fresno CA 93775-1867
Phone:
(559) 600-3330
Fax:
(559) 455-4705
Hours:
Monday - Friday 8:00am - 5:00pm
Healthy Families Fresno County is a voluntary home visitation program that enroll families in Fresno County beginning in pregnancy or soon after birth and continues until a least the child’s third birthday.
Home visits are typically about an hour at your home. Home visits will begin on a weekly basis and may shift to every other week, or monthly depending on the family’s progress, as our staff build supportive relationships with parents and caregivers, focusing on their cultural strengths, goals, child development, and connecting them to needed services.
Our program services are free.
NOW ENROLLING!
Call Ana at (559) 600-3330 if you have questions or interested in completing a referral.
.

Improve personal and family well-being
Build family functioning by reducing risk and building protective factors.
